ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading in UTC */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that captured this reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading from the sensor */,
  "illumination" REAL /* Illumination level detected by the sensor */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading from the sensor */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality record */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reading is validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is deployed */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was deployed */,
  "calibration_schedule" TEXT /* Calibration schedule for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment or setup */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data processing method applied */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date when the processing was applied */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used for data processing */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for data processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check record */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor reading being validated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Validity of the reading (true/false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the research project */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project linked to this analysis */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used for analysis */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature high, humidity low) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method used for sending the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance task */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that this metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_metadata_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor type that this rule applies to */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., range check, threshold check) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the validation rule */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to take when the rule is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sensor_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_associations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_project_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_project_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_project_associations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
